Side Project

Muzika

WIP

Your library. Your vibe.

A beautifully crafted music player for iOS and Android. Muzika connects natively to your Jellyfin media server — stream your personal library anywhere — and uses AI playlist generation to build the perfect queue from your listening history.

  • cell_tower Jellyfin-native — seamless self-hosted streaming
  • auto_awesome AI Playlists — mood & context-aware queue generation
  • headphones Cross-platform — iOS, Android, built with Flutter/Swift
  • palette Dynamic theming — album art drives the whole UI
FlutterSwiftJellyfin APIPython AIREST
